events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"staged","component_conditions":["non-compliant"],"percent_complete":0,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Wrong thread sealant staged for gas piping — not gas-rated, risk of leakage/fire/explosion"],"actions":["Remove non-gas-rated thread sealant from staging","Use only gas-rated thread sealant or PTFE tape listed for fuel gas (e.g., gas-rated pipe joint compound or yellow PTFE tape) per manufacturer instructions and code","Verify all materials are approved for fuel gas before assembly"],"rationale":"Gas piping requires thread sealants specifically listed and approved for fuel gas. Non-gas-rated sealants can degrade, fail to seal, or react with gas, creating leak and fire/explosion hazards. IFGC and NFPA 54 require approved materials and methods for gas piping joints.","references":["IFGC","NFPA 54"]}
